description: From domain (example.com) differs from the Message-ID domain (mailer.example.net) on an otherwise clean, trusted, all-passing message, isolating the consistency rule. messageIdDomainMatchesFromDomain is false and a single low-severity messageId.domainMismatch signal is emitted carrying both normalized domains. Low severity reflects that this mismatch is also common for legitimate ESPs/forwarders.

authentication-results: mx.example.net; dmarc=pass header.from=example.com; spf=pass smtp.mailfrom=example.com; dkim=pass header.d=example.com

authenticationResults.raw: mx.example.net; dmarc=pass header.from=example.com; spf=pass smtp.mailfrom=example.com; dkim=pass header.d=example.com

signals.message: Message-ID domain differs from the From domain.
